creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2007-02-27 08:21:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/avanor         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Avanor is a roguelike game with a easy ADOM-like user interface, it
  has countryside and subterranean areas to explore, a quest system, and
  some original features.
  
  WWW: http://www.avanor.com/
  
  PR:             ports/109588
  Submitted by:   Martin Tournoij <carpetsmoker at xs4all.nl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1095    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/games/avanor/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/avanor/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/games/avanor/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +17 -0     ports/games/avanor/pkg-plist (new)
